$comment: MCP tool catalog for NeNe Contact. Each tool maps to a Contact OpenAPI operation (ADR 0002 — Contact OpenAPI only, never a sibling DB). Consumed by tools/local-mcp-server.php via Nene2\Mcp\LocalMcpToolCatalog. Read-only for now; writes (with confirmation) land in a later M6 slice.

tools.name: contact_list_forms
tools.title: List contact forms
tools.description: List the organization's contact forms (structure and metadata only — no secrets, no submitted personal data).

limit.description: Maximum number of forms to return (default 50).

tools.name: contact_list_submissions
tools.title: List submissions
tools.description: List submissions for triage. Redacted by default (no IP/user-agent, field values masked). Set include_pii=true ONLY when raw personal data is genuinely required — it returns unmasked values and is audit-logged (charter §11).

limit.description: Maximum number of submissions to return (default 20).

include_pii.description: Return raw (unmasked) field values. Audit-logged as a bulk PII access (charter §11). Default false.

tools.name: contact_get_submission
tools.title: Get a submission
tools.description: Fetch one submission by id. Redacted by default; include_pii=true returns raw values and is audit-logged (charter §11).

include_pii.description: Return raw (unmasked) field values. Audit-logged (charter §11). Default false.
